creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Markus Wipp from comment #0)
Hi Markus,

Thanks for the update, I've committed it with some changes.

Can you please make sure that you have latest (v2.2.0) ports-mgmt/modules2tuple version, these lines

 		# Mirrors for the following packages are not currently known, please look them up and handle these tuples manually:
		#	::v0.1.1:group_name/vendor/go.step.sm/crypto
 		#	::v1.0.0:group_name/vendor/sourcegraph.com/sqs/pbtypes

shouldn't be present when generated by v2.x.x.
